description: A maintainer operations toolkit for GitHub repositories with structured issue triage, PR briefs, release drafts, and repository intelligence.
readme_text:
OSS Maintainer Copilot is a maintainer operations toolkit for GitHub repositories.

```bash
python -m venv .venv
. .venv/Scripts/activate
python -m pip install --upgrade pip
python -m pip install -e .[dev]
pytest
```

The current workflows include issue triage, PR review preparation, release drafting, and repository intelligence.
contributing_text:
## Common Commands
python -m venv .venv
python -m pip install -e .[dev]
pytest
ruff check .
omc triage-issue --input tests/fixtures/issues/simple_docs_issue.json
omc repo-intel --input tests/fixtures/repos/repo_intel_python_toolkit.json
